name: Omega-3 Fatty Acids+ Folic acid + Selenium + Coenzyme Q10 + Vitamin E + Catechins + Glycyrrhizin | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications:
PROFERTIL female capsule is indicated in-

Female Infertility
For Women with Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS) and desire to have children
For Women 35+ with PCOS and desire to have children
composition:
Each Tablet/Capsule Contains:        

Omega-3 fatty acids: 500 mg 
Folic acid: 800 mcg 
Selenium: 700 mcg 
Coenzyme Q10: 30 mg 
Vitamin E: 30 mg 
Catechins extract: 4 mg 
Glycyrrhizin extract: 12 mg
pharmacology:
Fertility declines significantly with Age as the AMH (anti-Mullerian Hormone) level declines with age.PROFERTIL female significantly –

Improves AMH LEVEL by +30.9%
Increases ENDOMETRIUM THICKNESS by +19.5%
Regulates MENSTRUATION CYCLE with improving occurrence of Regular OVULATION by +194.4%.
Increases the FERTILIZATION RATE to 66.7% & EMBRYO QUALITY in 58% Patients.

Significantly regulates all PCOS Specific Parameters.Proven Pregnancy Rate 40.0%-43.8%The study results have shown that PROFERTIL female is superior to exclusively taking folic acid in terms of improving female fertility.
dosage__administration: Take 1 soft capsule and 1 tablet daily with some liquid with or after a meal. Ideally, the tablet should always be taken together with the soft capsule.
side_effects: No side effects were observed in the clinical studies on PROFERTIL female. In addition, PROFERTIL female is well tolerated.
storage_conditions: PROFERTIL female should be stored dry, protected from light and not above room temperature (25°C).
common_questions_about_omega3_fatty_acid:
What is PROFERTIL female?PROFERTIL female is a study-tested “fertility pill” to increase female fertility. Taking PROFERTIL female contributes to a regular menstrual cycle with ovulation. The woman’s body is then optimally prepared for the upcoming pregnancy.For whom is PROFERTIL female suitable?PROFERTIL female is basically suitable for all women who want to have children- with or without PCO syndrome. Especially from the age of 30, the intake of pure folic acid is often no longer sufficient to cover the increased nutrient requirements for fertility. Can PROFERTIL female be taken as part of IVF treatment?PROFERTIL female should be taken in preparation for or during IVF treatment to increase the chances of a successful pregnancy.How does PROFERTIL female work?PROFERTIL female is believed to protect the ovaries from oxidative stress. The resulting positive effect on female fertility has been shown in the results of several clinical studies.Are there studies on the effectiveness of PROFERTIL female?The effectiveness of the PROFERTIL female formulation has been confirmed in several clinical studies. A supportive effect on cycle regularity, ovulation as well as the thickness of the uterine lining (endometrium) could be shown. In addition, an improvement in AMH levels was demonstrated. PROFERTIL female can therefore increase the probability of successful conception.How do I notice the effect of PROFERTIL female?You can monitor your cycle yourself relatively easily with the help of a cycle calendar and determine whether it is regular. PROFERTIL female can help women with an irregular cycle to have a more regular cycle. This supportive effect has also been proven in a clinical study.In addition, an appointment with your gynecologist allows you to assess the thickness of the endometrium (= thickness of the lining of the uterus) by ultrasound. Clinical data on PROFERTIL female show that regular use can improve endometrial thickness. This is an important prerequisite for a later, successful implantation of the fertilized egg.How is PROFERTIL female used?It is recommended to take PROFERTIL female from the time you wish to have a child until the pregnancy is confirmed. One tablet should be taken daily together with one soft capsule with some liquid with or after a meal.Do I have to take the tablet and soft capsule at the same time?The tablet should ideally always be taken together with the soft capsule. The intended daily dose should be adhered to.Should I continue to take PROFERTIL female if I am already pregnant?PROFERTIL female supports female fertility, but is not a pregnancy vitamin. It should therefore only be taken until pregnancy has been confirmed. During pregnancy, a woman’s nutritional needs change and for this reason other preparations should be used.However, this also means that there is nothing to be said against using up the remaining pack as soon as the pregnancy is known (or suspected). Since PROFERTIL female is a “fertility pill”, you should subsequently switch to a pregnancy vitamin. This means changing to a product that optimally covers the specific nutrient requirements during pregnancy. Please consult your trusted doctor about this.How long should PROFERTIL be taken?This is very individual from woman to woman and depending on the initial situation (e.g. combined intake with hormones in the context of IVF treatment). In the clinical studies, a significant improvement of typical fertility parameters was observed after 3 months in the case of taking PROFERTIL female alone. In principle, PROFERTIL female can and should be taken until the pregnancy is confirmed.What should I do if I forget to take PROFERTIL female?If you forget to take PROFERTIL female, please make up for it by the next possible time. However, do not take twice the amount of PROFERTIL female if you have forgotten to take it before. The daily dosage of one tablet and one soft capsule should not be exceeded.What happens if I forget to take PROFERTIL female for a few days?Continue to take PROFERTIL female as usual. If you stop taking PROFERTIL female for a long time, the effect may be reduced.What exactly is the composition of the omega-3 fatty acids in PROFERTIL female?One yellow soft capsule contains 500 mg of highly concentrated omega-3 fatty acids. Due to the high quality of the raw materials, the EPA & DHA content is over 80%.Has the used fish oil been cleaned from pollutants, PCBs and heavy metals and is therefore guaranteed to be free of these substances?The raw materials of PROFERTIL female (and thus also the fish oil capsule) are tested in every batch on:

Heavy metals (arsenic, lead, mercury and cadmium) as well as on
Pesticides and environmental toxins (PCBs, DDT, DDD, DDE, HCB, Benzoapyrene, PAH4, PCDDs and PCDFs) and the values obtained must be below the limit values, which are considered as “safe” by the authorities.
What gelatine is the PROFERTIL female soft capsule made of?It is made out of bovine gelatine.Is PROFERTIL female suitable for vegans?The PROFERTIL female soft capsule is made of bovine gelatine and contains fish oil. It is therefore not suitable for vegans.From which fish is the contained fish oil obtained?The fish oil contained in PROFERTIL female is obtained from anchovies, sardines and mackerel.Is PROFERTIL female gluten-free?PROFERTIL female is gluten-free.Is PROFERTIL female halal?PROFERTIL female is a halal-certified product.Is PROFERTIL female suitable for allergy sufferers?PROFERTIL female contains fish oil.Is PROFERTIL female lactose-free?Yes, PROFERTIL female is lactose-free.Does PROFERTIL female contain hormones?No. PROFERTIL female is a hormone-free product.Is PROFERTIL female available only on prescription?PROFERTIL female is a dietary food for special medical purposes and therefore does not require a prescription. However, it should be taken under medical supervision. Before taking PROFERTIL female for the first time and in case of changes in intake, it is necessary to consult your doctor.In which package sizes is PROFERTIL female available?PROFERTIL female is available as a monthly pack and as a 3-month pack.Can I take PROFERTIL female together with other medicines?So far, no interactions are known when taking PROFERTIL female with other medicines. In any case, however, the doctor in charge should be consulted.Can I take additional supplements to support female fertility or is PROFERTIL female alone sufficient?PROFERTIL female was specially developed to support female fertility and is confirmed in clinical studies. Taking additional food supplements to improve the chances of a successful pregnancy is therefore not necessary.I do not suffer from PCOS. Can I still take PROFERTIL female to improve my chances of getting pregnant?PROFERTIL female was specially developed to optimally prepare the female body for pregnancy. The composition, which has been tested in studies, supports female fertility. PROFERTIL female is therefore ideal for all women who want to have children – with or without PCOS.Is taking PROFERTIL female dependent on my menstrual cycle?No, taking PROFERTIL female is not dependent on your menstrual cycle. It is recommended to continue taking it daily (without interruption) until pregnancy occurs.Does PROFERTIL female help to improve egg cell quality?PROFERTIL female supports female fertility, which includes the development of the egg cells.Can I take PROFERTIL female for Hashimoto’s thyroiditis?Several studies have shown that taking PROFERTIL female can regulate the hormone balance and increase the chance of pregnancy. In principle, there is therefore no contraindication, as no iodine is supplemented in the composition of PROFERTIL female. PROFERTIL female can thus be taken as a supportive measure in cases of fertility and Hashimoto’s thyroiditis. We would like to point out here that, among other things, a sufficient supply of selenium is important. The composition of PROFERTIL female also contributes to this. In any case, consultation with your doctor is recommended.Why is there a reference on the package regarding green tea extract?The study-proven formulation of PROFERTIL female contains 4mg EGCG (catechins from green tea extract) per day. According to a new regulation from the European commission all manufacturers of food supplements containing green tee catechins have to inform consumers about the maximum recommended daily consumption (regardless of the contained dosage in the supplement).The consumption of 800mg EGCG per day should not be exceeded, should not be consumed by pregnant or breastfeeding women and children below 18 years old, should not be consumed if other green tea products are consumed on the same day, should not be consumed on an empty stomach.
